prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约1423名，2023年升至约880名，2024年出现断档暴跌至约14269名，2025年恢复至约982名。近3年波动剧烈，2024年断档后2025年已基本回归正 常水平，2025年基准位次约982名；2022-2024年理科计划均为19人，2025年物理类计划扩至31人；2026年物理类计划缩减至20人，较2025年缩招约35.5% ，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名近年从第27名（2021）逐步降至第32名（2026），仍稳居全国Top 35，综合实力强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及多起校园偷拍事件（35条事件中34条负面），学校仅给予留校察看处分引发舆论批评，可 能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制。抖音热度排名第87，评价"一般"，短视频平台关注度不高。未见明显投档断档记录；轻工技术与工程A+，化学工程与技术 、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程、食品科学与工程均为A，建筑学、控制科学与工程、机械工程、管理科学与工程为A-，共9个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等华南理工优势相关专业持续高热推荐，工科热度不减；本省2026年考生总数约66,000人，物理类估算约44,550人，与2 025年物理类44,491人基本持平，竞争基数稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次982名、2026年大幅缩招（31→20人）带来的竞争加 剧效应、声誉负面事件对报考热度的潜在抑制，以及本省考生规模基本稳定，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所前移（更难进），预测最低位次约788名，区间670-906名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越人才班）（含电气工程及其自动化（卓越班）、软件工程（卓越班）、电子科学与技术（卓越班）等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、网络工程、信息安全）
- 自动化（“自动化+工商管理”双学位班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电气类（电气工程及其自动化、能源与动力工程）
- 信息工程
- 工科试验班（智能装备与先进制造）（机械工程、机械电子工程、智能车辆工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 工科试验班（AI先进技术拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间670-906名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间上限（如670名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（卓越班、计算机类）；位次接近区间下限（906名附近）建议以二档为稳妥选择，三档作为保底。华南理工大学工科实力突出，计算机、电气、自动化等专业就业前景良好，值得重点考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 1423, rising to about 880 in 2023, then experiencing a sharp drop to about 14269 in 2024, and recovering to about 982 in 2025. The fluctuations over the past 3 years have been severe; after the 2024 drop, 2025 has basically returned to normal levels, with a baseline ranking of about 982 in 2025. The science enrollment plan was 19 from 2022 to 2024, expanding to 31 in 2025 for the physics category. In 2026, the physics category plan is reduced to 20, a decrease of about 35.5% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has gradually dropped from 27th (2021) to 32nd (2026), but it remains firmly in the national Top 35, with strong overall strength. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly involving multiple campus peeping incidents (34 negative out of 35 incidents). The school only imposed probationary sanctions, sparking public criticism, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 87th, with an evaluation of 'average,' indicating low attention on short video platforms. No obvious admission drop records have been seen. Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, and Food Science and Engineering are all A, while Architecture, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering are A-, totaling 9 A- and above disciplines, highlighting strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other advantageous majors of South China University of Technology continue to be highly recommended, with engineering popularity remaining strong. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 66,000, with an estimated 44,550 in the physics category, basically unchanged from the 44,491 in 2025, keeping the competition base stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 982, the intensified competition due to the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (31 to 20), the potential suppression of application enthusiasm from negative reputation events, and the stable number of candidates in the province, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 788, with a range of 670-906.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellent Talent Class) (including Electrical Engineering and Automation (Excellent Class), Software Engineering (Excellent Class), Electronic Science and Technology (Excellent Class), etc.)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Network Engineering, Information Security)
- Automation ('Automation + Business Administration' Dual Degree Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electrical Class (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Information Engineering
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Equipment and Advanced Manufacturing) (Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronic Engineering, Intelligent Vehicle Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Advanced Technology Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 670-906, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 670), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors (Excellent Class, Computer Class). If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (around 906), it is advisable to choose Tier 2 as a stable option and Tier 3 as a safety. South China University of Technology has outstanding engineering strength, and majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Automation have good employment prospects, making them worth serious consideration.
